title: Merge the cf-access-operator-docs worktree into main
action: Commit main's session-bookkeeping-only dirty state, then run bee worktree merge --id herdr-gateway--wt--cf-access-operator-docs --cleanup. The worktree is docs-only (docs/advanced/configuration.md: Cloudflare Access operator setup guide), tree clean, 1 commit ahead of main.

truths: Main's pre-merge bookkeeping-only dirty state is committed before the merge runs
git merge --no-ff wt/cf-access-operator-docs lands on main
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
--cleanup removes the worktree, deletes wt/cf-access-operator-docs, and drops its grant
prohibitions: Do not touch the other two open worktrees (agent-pane-orchestration, self-update-merge-config)

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv cf-access-operator-docs && echo MERGE_OK
